description: PR-9 learner-state engine logic review (companion to pr9-learner-state.md).
method: adversarial audit of cc_spine/learner_state.py against four invariants (determinism, fail-closed holdout rejection, no content leak, scheduling/closure/confidence correctness), backed by 15 executable tests in test_learner_state.py that encode each invariant.

invariants_checked.note: attempts sorted (submitted_at,item_id); per_domain sorted; fully-keyed review_queue sort; no wall clock or random; order-independence proven by test
raises before any state mutation on holdout and unknown ids; missing holdout file still rejects via the unknown-item path
state stores selected_index + misconception_id + registry teaching text; no stem, full choice text, or answer key
Leitner promote/demote, due math, closure-after-2, and confidence rules verified; dividers guarded (c/n if n; empty-missed -> 1.0); empty stream yields a valid empty state

note: An independent agent review was also dispatched; this operator audit plus the test suite is the committed record.
